title: Dates and Rates
excerpt: Summer 2026 Dates First Session: Sunday, June 7, 2026 to Thursday, July 2, 2026 Second Session: Monday, July 6, 2026 to Friday, July 31, 2026 4-Week Sessions Open to rising 3rd-11th graders First Session: Sunday, June 7 to Thursday, July 2 Second Session: Monday, July 6 to Friday, July 31 2-Week Sessions Sessions A & […]
contentHtml:
Summer 2026 Dates

First Session: Sunday, June 7, 2026 to Thursday, July 2, 2026
Second Session: Monday, July 6, 2026 to Friday, July 31, 2026

4-Week Sessions

Open to rising 3rd-11th graders

First Session: Sunday, June 7 to Thursday, July 2
Second Session: Monday, July 6 to Friday, July 31

2-Week Sessions

Sessions A & B are open to rising 3rd-5th graders Session C is open to rising 3rd and 4th graders

A: Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 19 (13 days)
B: Sunday, June 21 to Thursday, July 2 (12 days)
C: Monday, July 6 to Friday, July 17 (12 days)

1-Week Sessions (CBM Experience)

Open to rising 2nd and 3rd graders

CBMX Aleph: Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 12 (6 days)
CBMX Bet: Sunday, June 14 to Friday, June 19 (6 days)
CBMX Gimel: Sunday, June 21 to Friday, June 26 (6 days)
CBMX Zayin: Sunday, July 19 to Friday, July 24 (6 days)

One-Day Program (Discovery Day)

Open to rising 1st graders

Discovery Day: Sunday, June 28

Chalutzim

Open to campers with special needs

4-week Session (ages 12-24): Sunday, June 7 to Thursday, July 2
2-week Session (ages 12-24): Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 19 (13 days)
1-week Session (ages 10-22): Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 12 (6 days)

For more information about each of our options, please check out Our Programs.

Summer 2026 Rates

Session  Rising Grade MJCCA Member Other JCC Member  Community
1 week CBM Experience Grades 2 & 3 $1,165 $1,165 $1,165
2 weeks A: Youth Grades 3–5 $4,130 $4,230 $4,330
2 weeks B: Youth Grades 3–5 $3,810 $3,910 $4,010
2 weeks C: Youth Grades 3 & 4 $3,810 $3,910 $4,010
4 weeks Youth Grades 3–8 $6,240 $6,440 $6,640
4 weeks Teen Grades 9 & 10 $6,680 $6,880 $7,080
4 weeks J.I.T. Grade 11 $7,055 $7,255 $7,455
1 week Chalutzim Experience Ages 10–22 $1,165 $1,165 $1,165
2 weeks Chalutzim Ages 12–24 $4,235 $4,335 $4,435
4 weeks Chalutzim Ages 12–24 $6,680 $6,880 $7,080
1 day Discovery Day Grade 1 $100 $100 $100

PLEASE NOTE:
The fees above do not include the canteen fee – $190 for 4 weeks and $95 for 2 weeks – which includes daily canteen snack, camper t-shirt, camper laundry, and other incidentals.
The fees above do not include the security fee – $140 for 4 weeks, $70 for 2 weeks, and $35 for 1 week.
We offer a sibling discount of $100 off for the first sibling, and $400 off per sibling after the first sibling.

Deposit

A non-refundable deposit of $500 is required to reserve a space for any program. The deposit will be reduced to $375 for anyone applying for financial assistance.

Payment Schedule

Monthly Billing
Families may elect to pay monthly on the fifth of each month with the first payment due on October 5, 2025, and the final payment due on April 5, 2026. Families who register after October 5 will have the tuition divided evenly over the remainder of the billing schedule. Families who register after April 5 must pay in full.

Pay In Full
Families may also elect to pay in full. This payment will be due at the time of registration. There is no discount for paying in full. Payment for Discovery Day will be due in full at the time of registration.

Withdrawal / Cancellation Deadlines

Families who withdraw prior to February 1 will be eligible for a 100% refund (except for deposit). After that, withdrawals will be managed on a rolling schedule:

  • February 1–29: 50% of tuition (after deposit) will be refunded.
  • March 1–31: 25% of tuition (after deposit) will be refunded.
  • On or after April 1: No refunds.
